name: GitHub repositories should have default branch protection
description: Repositories where the default branch is not protected
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where Cyscale did not observe branch protection on the default branch.

### Assessment context

Default branch protection reduces accidental or unauthorized changes to production source branches and should be configured with repository rulesets or classic branch protection.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Enable a repository ruleset or branch protection rule for the default branch. Require pull request review and status checks before merging changes.
